name: Romios Gold Resources Inc.
summary: Romios Gold Resources Inc. engages in the exploration of precious and base metals in Canada. It primarily explores for gold, silver, and copper deposits. It holds a 100% interest in the Lundmark-Akow Lake gold-copper property located in northwestern Ontario; and holds interest in the La Corne molybdenum mine property in Quebec and the Scossa gold mine property in Nevada. Romios Gold Resources Inc. was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.
